name: a real CI/CD token still activates the ci-cd workload type despite internal punctuation
command: T=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "ship through a CI/CD pipeline" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'puts (JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]["workload_types"]).join(",")'); echo "$T" | grep -qE 'ci-cd' && echo cicd-token-fires 1>&2
